highlights: One credential across many machines — assign to specific configs, an SCVMM cloud's VMs, or the whole organization
Auto-login on RDP/VNC connect; the password is injected at the worker and never reaches the browser
Rotate once, applies everywhere the credential is scoped
Share / assign machines from any password; promote a machine-embedded password to shared in one step (origin keeps access)
Org-level Shared Credentials view; a machine's detail page shows the shared credentials that apply to it
Separate org-grantable permissions (use vs. manage scope); cross-org/cross-tenant sharing impossible; every use and scope change audit-logged
